quick question - do playground tokens use up my monthly quota or are they separate?

image wont gen. no error. whats the deal? need this asap

Actions broken. Schema changed. Fix it.
Actions stopped after schema update. Pls help. Customer is upset.
atlas broken. pages blank. fix pls im on deadline
opt me out of data training
opt out training - does it work backwards??
can i restrict an api key to only work from certain ip addresses. im paranoid about security
Do you support IP whitelisting for API keys? My team is asking about it but I'm not sure if the feature exists.

hey the research mode is broken for me. sources dont load. thought maybe it was my internet but ive tested it multiple ways and the issue is definitely with the links youre providing. also the chatbot sometimes takes forever to respond but thats maybe a different problem
